description: Turn Lighthouse audits into coding-agent fix packs for Claude Code, Cursor, and Copilot.

tools.name: analyze_website_performance
tools.description: Runs Lighthouse (mobile + desktop) and bounded page inspection against a target URL. Returns structured fixPacks with repo search hints, implementation steps, and acceptance criteria. Covers performance (Core Web Vitals), accessibility, technical SEO, LLM visibility, and llms.txt readiness.

url.description: The publicly accessible URL to audit (HTTP or HTTPS).

mode.description: fast: one mobile + one desktop run. reliable: three runs per profile with median aggregation. Defaults to reliable.
